Productivity Boost: Automate Google Forms, Sheets, and Calendar With GAS

Google Forms and Google Calendar are tools we use constantly, but copying form submissions into the calendar by hand is the kind of busywork that screams "automate me". This post walks through using Google Apps Script (GAS) to wire Forms → Sheets → Calendar end to end — reading sheet data, parsing the locale-dependent time format, avoiding duplicate event creation, and triggering the script on a 10-minute schedule.
Use Google Apps Script + Google Sheets to Spin Up a Quick API

Sometimes you just need a quick API and don't want to stand up a whole backend (Koa, Express, Laravel — too much for a one-off). Google Apps Script + Google Sheets gets you there fast — sheet as the database, GAS as the lightweight server. This post walks through creating the sheet, reading rows, exposing them as a GET endpoint, deploying as a Web App, and formatting the response as clean JSON.
Hit a CORS Wall and Can't Touch the Backend? Wrap It With Google Apps Script

Calling an API from the frontend and getting slapped with a CORS error, but you can't change the backend? This post starts from the idea of the Same-origin policy, then uses Google Apps Script to wrap a little proxy around a third-party API. That turns it into your own same-origin API and gets you past the CORS restriction.
